body:
Fixes #108

## Summary
- Reworked the mobile topbar so the menu button is on the left, the logo/wordmark is hidden on mobile, and logo/title/version move into the drawer.
- Added desktop version display next to the formal-ai logo/title.
- Replaced the mobile stacked composer with a compact one-row input: action/menu button, textarea, and small send button.
- Added configurable composer style (`flat`, `glass-soft`, `glass-clear`, `bubble`) and action icon (`attach`, `plus`) persisted in existing Links Notation preferences.
- Added a composer menu for Attach files, Export memory, Import memory, and Report issue.
- Added `dvh`/`visualViewport` height handling and safe-area padding for mobile browser UI.
- Preserved issue evidence and research under `docs/case-studies/issue-108/`.

## Reproduction
1. Open the web demo at a mobile viewport such as 390x780.
2. Before this change, the mobile composer stacked into a large control and the focused state could leave the top menu unreachable.
3. With this change, disable demo mode, focus the input, and the top-left menu remains visible while the composer stays in one row above the bottom browser UI.
4. Open the menu drawer and verify the logo, title, version, and sidebar controls are inside the drawer.

## Screenshots
Focused mobile composer after the fix:

![Focused mobile composer](https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/blob/issue-108-e4fa776bf7e7/docs/case-studies/issue-108/screenshots/after-mobile-focused-390x780.png?raw=true)

Mobile drawer after the fix:

![Mobile drawer with branding](https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/blob/issue-108-e4fa776bf7e7/docs/case-studies/issue-108/screenshots/after-mobile-drawer-390x780.png?raw=true)

## Tests
- `node --check src/web/app.js`
- `node --check src/web/i18n.js`
- `cd tests/e2e && npm run test:local -- --grep "Issue #108"` (4 passed)
- `cd tests/e2e && npm run test:local` (86 passed)
- `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`
- `cargo test --all-features --verbose` (266 passed, 69 ignored)
- `cargo test --doc --verbose` (0 doctests)
- `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs` (passed; existing warning-level line-count notices for `src/solver_helpers.rs` and `src/seed.rs`)
title: Improve mobile composer UI and input configuration
